title: Dealt Damage Counter
description: Dealt Damage Counter is a client-side Fabric mod that displays dealt and received damage during combat.
body:
Dealt Damage Counter is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that helps you track how much HP you deal to enemies and how much HP you lose during combat.

The mod displays dealt damage in multiple places, including chat, console, the mod GUI, and directly above the target’s head. It can also show received damage in chat, console, the mod GUI, and on your own screen, making it easier to understand combat situations without guessing how much damage was actually dealt.

Dealt Damage Counter is designed for players who want clearer combat feedback, better damage tracking, and a simple way to see real HP values while playing.

Features:

- displays dealt damage in HP
- displays received damage in HP
- shows dealt damage above the target’s head
- shows received damage on your screen
- chat damage messages
- console damage logs
- in-game GUI damage display
- useful for PvP and combat testing
- client-side usage
- lightweight and simple

Example use cases:

- see how much HP you dealt to another player
- track how much HP you lost during combat
- test weapon damage more clearly
- compare different attacks or items
- get instant combat feedback without checking logs manually
- display damage information directly in-game

Requirements:

Minecraft with Fabric Loader
Fabric API
